CustomObject.description: Enterprise Knowledge Foundation (Program 021): the canonical living intelligence profile for any organization (self, partner, prime, customer, agency). Links to Account + OA_Discovered_Organization__c (reuses identity, no duplication) and adds the knowledge/capability/past-performance/AI-summary layer that Opportunity/Proposal/Capture/Partner Intelligence consume. Governed: AI writes narrative + confidence only.
CustomObject.label: Company Profile
